prompt: Create a dreamy vertical zodiac-inspired character poster based on the soft emotional world and cozy slice-of-life aesthetic of Yumi’s Cells, reimagined through a strong Taurus personality theme. Keep the subject’s real face completely untouched and natural. Surround the subject with several adorable mini 3D chibi “cell” versions of themselves, glossy, expressive, slightly raw and realistic, with oversized heads and tiny detailed bodies inspired by Korean-style character design. Each mini Taurus cell should embody a different mood or trait: one hugging the subject’s arm possessively, one wrapped in a fluffy blanket, one calmly reading a book, one sipping warm coffee or tea, one obsessed with desserts or snacks, one lazily scrolling on a phone while lying down, one stubbornly refusing to get up, one sleepy and emotionally unbothered, and one with messy “just woke up” energy. Their expressions should feel playful, comforting, cozy, and emotionally relatable. Include hand-drawn doodle-style elements integrated naturally into the composition — soft sketch outlines around poses, tiny flowers, sparkles, steam swirls from drinks, fluffy cushions, floating symbols, relaxed motion accents, and whimsical notes that interact with both the subject and the mini cells. The overall design should feel warm, aesthetic, and emotionally intimate with clean layout balance, white sticker-style borders, glossy high-detail 3D chibi rendering, and a cozy Korean editorial poster vibe. Use a harmonious palette of sage green, warm cream, dusty pink, beige, soft brown, and muted earthy tones. Blend luxury-loving comfort energy with calm softness and subtle humor so the identity is deeply felt throughout the entire artwork.
